mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Spicers Hiddenvale: match Hunt Group Premium, Voicemail, Basic to S7326 (Voice/IP Tel 10 Number Block)
UPDATE billing_items 
SET serviceExternalId = 'S7326', matchStatus = 'matched', matchConfidence = 'high'
WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate' AND customerExternalId = 'C0224' AND matchStatus = 'unmatched';

-- Wineology (C0290) - check voice services
SELECT s.externalId, s.serviceType, s.planName FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0290' AND s.status = 'active';
